questions.question: The silk fibre is produced by:

options.B: Silkworm larva (caterpillar of Bombyx mori) forming cocoon

questions.question: The bee that collects nectar and produces honey is:

options.B: Worker bee (female)

questions.question: Lac is secreted by:

options.B: Lac insect (Kerria lacca – a scale insect)

questions.question: Pisciculture refers to:

options.B: Cultivation of fish in controlled environment

questions.question: Broiler chickens are raised for:

options.B: Meat production

questions.question: The scientific name of the Indian honey bee is:

options.B: Apis cerana indica

questions.question: The most important host plant for silkworm cultivation is:

options.B: Mulberry (Morus alba)

questions.question: Artificial insemination in cattle is done to:

options.B: Breed cattle using sperm from superior bulls without natural mating

questions.question: The queen bee mates with:

options.B: Multiple drones during mating flight

questions.question: Prawn culture is also known as:

options.B: Aquaculture/Shrimp farming (specifically mariculture for marine prawns)

questions.question: The hormone oxytocin is used in dairy industry to:

options.B: Stimulate milk let-down in cattle

questions.question: Which breed of cow is known for highest milk production?

options.B: Holstein-Friesian

questions.question: Royal jelly is secreted by:

options.B: Worker bees' hypopharyngeal glands (fed to queen larvae and young larvae)

questions.question: Scrub typhus is transmitted by:

options.B: Mites (trombiculid mites)

questions.question: The lac insect Kerria lacca belongs to order:

options.B: Hemiptera

questions.question: Ovine refers to animals of genus:

options.B: Ovis (sheep)

questions.question: The silkworm cocoon is softened before reeling by:

options.B: Boiling in hot water (kills pupa, softens sericin gum binding silk)

questions.question: Aquaculture is the rearing of:

options.B: Aquatic organisms (fish, prawns, oysters, seaweed) in controlled conditions

questions.question: Jersey and Holstein-Friesian are breeds of:

options.B: Cattle (Bos taurus – exotic dairy breeds)

questions.question: The drone bee (male) in a colony:

options.B: Mates with the queen and then dies

questions.question: Vermicomposting uses:

options.B: Earthworms to decompose organic waste into compost

questions.question: CAMPA stands for:

options.A: Central Animal Management and Production Authority
options.B: Compensatory Afforestation Fund Management and Planning Authority
options.C: Central Aquaculture Management and Planning Agency
options.D: Central Animal Medicine and Pathology Authority

questions.question: Murrah and Surti are breeds of:

options.B: Buffalo

questions.question: Stabling in poultry farming refers to:

options.B: Housing system for poultry birds

questions.question: Inland fisheries include:

options.B: Fresh water fish capture and culture in rivers, lakes, ponds

questions.question: Shrimp culture in India is mainly done in:

options.B: Coastal brackish water ponds

questions.question: Insemination in poultry is used to breed:

options.B: Superior high-yielding hybrid varieties

questions.question: Carp is which type of fish?

options.B: Freshwater fish (catfish family)

questions.question: The enzyme amylase is used in:

options.B: Industrial processing (starch to sugar conversion, textile, paper industry)

questions.question: White revolution in India is related to:

options.B: Milk production (Operation Flood – Dr Verghese Kurien)

questions.question: Blue revolution in India refers to:

options.B: Fish production (fisheries development)

questions.question: The silk thread is extracted from the cocoon by:

options.B: Reeling – unwinding the continuous silk thread from softened cocoon in hot water

questions.question: The mite Varroa destructor is a major pest of:

options.B: Honey bees (causes varroosis/varroa mite infestation)

questions.question: Straw boards (racks) used in sericulture are called:

options.B: Chandraki / Mountages (used to support cocoon spinning by silkworms)

questions.question: Which fish is known as 'tiger of water' due to predatory nature?

options.B: Snakehead fish (Channa striata)

questions.question: Artificial reefs are used in fisheries to:

options.B: Provide habitat for fish aggregation and breeding

questions.question: Transgenic animals used in animal husbandry have:

options.B: Foreign genes incorporated to improve traits (disease resistance, growth, milk quality)

questions.question: The host plants of tasar silkworm include:

options.B: Arjun and Asan trees (oak for temperate tasar)

questions.question: Apiculture involves cultivation of bees mainly for:

options.B: Honey and beeswax (also for pollination services)

questions.question: Embryo transfer technology (ETT) in cattle allows:

options.B: One high-yielding donor cow to produce many offspring using multiple surrogate mothers

questions.question: Which state is the leading producer of silk in India?

options.B: Karnataka

questions.question: Pearl culture involves:

options.B: Inserting nucleus (irritant) into freshwater/marine oysters to stimulate pearl formation

questions.question: Poultry waste can be used as:

options.B: Organic fertilizer (manure) for crops
